final:
module clock_gating (
    input wire clk,
    input wire enable,
    input wire d,
    output reg q
);
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};

    
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (enable) begin
            q <= d; // update the flip-flop output with input d
        end
        // else q retains its value
    end
endmodule
